resources.string: Shows the next sunrise or sunset and progress toward it.
NothingWidget needs location permission to calculate your local sunrise and sunset times. The widget uses the last known device location and does not call a weather API.
Location is allowed, but Android did not return a last known location yet. Open Maps once or try again outdoors.
Ready. Add the widget from your launcher, or refresh location after travelling.
Full solar day in about 24 minutes
